title: Settings
subtitle: Customize your admin panel experience
enableNotifDesc: Receive alerts about payments, maintenance and contracts
updateIntervalDesc: How often new notifications are checked
rentalModeDesc: Define whether your company offers long-term, short-term or both rental types
rentalModeHint: Changing the mode affects which options appear when creating properties and what your public portal shows. Existing properties keep their type.
compactModeDesc: Reduce spacing between elements to see more content
